titleStmt.title: SII 39.178: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 178. (A.R. No. 178 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKJUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VĪRAGAṆḌAGOPĀLA DĒVA-2ND YEAR.

summary.p: Incomplete. This inscription records the gift, by the king, of the village Kaṭṭaṉūr as Tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam by the king to the temple of Vijayarāghava Perumāḷ at Tiruppuṭkuḻi. Also some lands were granted to temple of Kailāśamuḍaiya nāyaṉār in the same village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī virakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟ�
ṭṭu tiruppati tiruppuṭkuḻi vicaiyarāghavap perumāḷukkut tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka Iṭṭa kaṭṭanūrkku tirumukappaṭi Uḷḷūril Uṭaiyār śrī kailācamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku vaṭakaḻaniyil Ampatiṉ kala varicaippaṟṟil tevatāṉa
ṟṟaṅkaraiyil muppatiṉ kalavaricaip paṟṟu kuḻi 1000 8 100 7 10 m Ēri Etirvāyil kuḻi 2 1000 mum tirunantavaṉam kālukku teṉkaraiyiṟ kuḻi 8 1000 2 100 7 10 5m Ivvūril viṉāyakap piḷḷaiyār tevatāṉam naṉceyi kuḻi 9 10 2m vaṭukappi
m kuḻi 100 7 10 9 m Ivaruṭaiya koyil nilam kuḻi 3 100 5 10 m piṭāripaṭṭi kuḻi 2 100 9 10 5- m Ittevi kollai kuḻi 5 10- m Āka palataṉi tevatāṉaṅkaḷāl naṉcey puṉcey Uṭpaṭa niṅkum kuḻi 9 1000 2 100 4 10 9 Ikkuḻi Oṉpatiṉāyiratti
ṉṟu nikki paḻavakāttu Ellaikkum puttakarattu Ellaikkuk kiḻ perellaikku vaṭakkum Appi Akaratārellaikku meṟkum pūttoṇṭār paṭṭār Ellaikkum Oṭṭa pākkattārellaikku vaṭakkum Innāṟpa
cay puṉceyuṭpaṭṭa Eppeṟpaṭṭa kaṭamai poṉvari Aṉaiccāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa Inta perumāḷ vijayarākavap perumāṉukke tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭeṉ virakaṇṭa kopāla
Digital edition of SII 39.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
